top_signals.title: £15 billion new funding boost to transform Armed Forces and keep the UK safe
top_signals.summary: Britain’s Armed Forces will be ready and equipped to fight the wars of today and the future following a landmark £15 billion investment to fund key equipment and technology, announced today.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Traders on High Alert as the Yen Hits a Four-Decade Low
top_signals.summary: The Japanese government has already tried once to stop the yen’s slide. Will it intervene again?
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: New Investors Fuel Record Share Sales by Listed Polish Firms
top_signals.summary: Poland’s companies are selling more shares on the secondary market than ever before in a trend driven by increasingly active local investors.

top_signals.title: AeroVironment soars 19% on earnings beat, backlog grows to $1.2 billion
top_signals.summary: Dronemaker AeroVironment's autonomous system revenue beat expectations by $90 million and its backlog continued to grow.
